title: Oats and banana muffins
excerpt: These oats and banana muffins are an absolute winner. Make them ahead of time. They keep for up to a week in a tupperware container in the fridge. Just take one out in the morning, pop it in the microwave and warm it up. Oat porridge and bananas have never been this good.

seo.title: Oats and banana muffins - Marinda Kook

html: These oats and banana muffins are an absolute winner. Make them ahead of time. They keep for up to a week in a tupperware container in the fridge. Just take one out in the morning, pop it in the microwave and warm it up. Oat porridge and bananas have never been this good.

items: 125 ml pecan nuts toasted and roughly chopped

steps: Heat the oven to 180C and spray or grease a muffin pan.
Mix everything except the pecan nuts well. Then fold in the pecan nuts.
Divide the mixture into your muffin pan and bake for 25 minutes.
Let it cool for 10 minutes in the pan. Eat it warm or cold.
